name: VICTOR Select Chicken Meal & Brown Rice Formula Dry Dog Food
description: Give your pup a meal to be proud of with VICTOR Select Chicken Meal & Brown Rice Dry Dog Food. This diet is made with premium-quality chicken meal as the first ingredient and fortified with vitamins, minerals, essential fatty acids, protein and amino acids. It is also gluten-free and ideal for those dogs with allergies to other meat proteins. Made with all life stages in mind, Victor Select Chicken Meal & Brown Rice Dry Dog Food is a complete and balanced diet for your furry friend.
